Expedition log 12 July

Signals from Reykjavík 🌌

Summary & coordinates

Temperature: −3 °C; bearing: 48°; range: 12½ km.

Clear, windy, and aurora likely; code α-42.

“North of the fjord, the sky became violet.”

— Zoë Nguyễn
